---
title: "search.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/live/search.ts"
loc: 51
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.70
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 4.35
overall_score: 4.03
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `searchMatrix`
- `searchMatrix`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `raw`
- `graph`
- `results`
- `lowerQuery`
- `relPath`
- `intentText`
- `matchesIntent`
- `matchesPath`
- `matchesEndpoints`
- `q`
